'''radotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrinolytic|fibrinolytic]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-d-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrinolytic|fibrinolytic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| radotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || rædetheth || rædethej || rædethesh || rædethe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || radodothoth || radodothoj || radodothosh || radodotho
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || radothoth || radothoj || radothosh || radotho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || radofthofth || radofthofj || radofthofsh || radofthof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || radothotho || radothojo || radothosho || radothoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || radothoth || radothoj || radothosh || radotho
|-
| [[Possessive]] || radothothol || radothojol || radothoshol || radothokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || radothoothotho || radothoojojo || radothooshosho || radothooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || radothothon || radothojon || radothoshon || radothokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || radothothooro || radothojooro || radothoshooro || radothokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
